heading: Preemption and election of State nonapplicability
label: 7945 Preemption and election of State nonapplicability
notes: CodificationSection was classified to prior to renumbering by .section 6735 of this titlePub. L. 114–95

children.heading: Preemption
children.label: a Preemption
children.text: This subpart preempts the laws of any State to the extent that such laws are inconsistent with this subpart, except that this subpart shall not preempt any State law that provides additional protection from liability relating to teachers.

children.heading: Election of State regarding nonapplicability
children.label: b Election of State regarding nonapplicability

children.text: citing the authority of this subsection;
declaring the election of such State that this subpart shall not apply, as of a date certain, to such civil action in the State; and
